scripts.clean: flutter clean && dart run build_runner clean && pnpm run clean:generated
scripts.codegen:build: dart run ffigen --config ffigen.yaml && doppler run -- dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
scripts.codegen:build:release: dart run ffigen --config ffigen.yaml && doppler run -c prod -- dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
scripts.codegen:watch: doppler run -- dart run build_runner watch --delete-conflicting-outputs
